entry.title: LUUV Natural Conditioner For Kids 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Conditioner
Price: 11.90

This enchanting conditioner deeply moisturizes, nourishes, and protects the hair, leaving it irresistibly shiny. LUUV children’s hair conditioner is certified with the prestigious ECOCERT/COSMOS eco-certificate.

Say goodbye to tangles and hello to effortlessly smooth and manageable hair! Conditioner strengthens hair from roots to ends, making it easy to comb and wonderfully lightweight. Infused with natural oils and betaine, it deeply moisturizes and enhances the overall health and beauty of the hair. And let’s not forget about that enchanting vanilla aroma! It’s derived from natural sources and is completely allergen-free. If your little one dreams of becoming the next Rapunzel with long, flowing locks, LUUV natural conditioner for kids is the perfect choice!

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Sweet vanilla scent
  • Does not irritate skin
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS certified
  • Natural origin 98,72%

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use:  Use the conditioner after shampoo and apply from the ends only. Let it sit and rinse! You can use the conditioner after every wash.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lecithin, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Olus Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Aroma

entry.title: BEE IT SUN SPF50 Maya 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 9.90

High protection sun milk, effective and protecting the skin from both UVA and UVB rays. Suitable for sensitive skin and also suitable for kids under 3 years old. Protects skin against aging, sun spots and keeps skin hydrated.

Also effective in protecting the bees!

How to use: Apply to face/body before sun exposure until absorbed. Repeat the application frequently for a safe, even and long-lasting tan.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, Octocrylene, Butyl methoxydibenzoylmethane, Methylene bis-benzotriazolyl tetramethylbutylphenol, Helianthus annuus (Sunflower) seed oil, Glyceryl stearate SE, Prunus amygdalus dulcis (Sweet almond) oil, Glycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Decyl glucoside, Tocopheryl acetate, Citric acid, Parfum [Fragrance], Ethylhexylglycerin, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea (Olive) fruit oil*, Oryza sativa (Rice) bran oil, Vitis vinifera (Grape) seed oil, Allantoin, Propylene glycol, Xanthan gum, Vaccinium myrtillus (Myrtle) fruit extract, Avena sativa (Oat) kernel extract*, Calendula officinalis flower extract*, Sodium hydroxide, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Shampoo & Body Wash for Kids Maya 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Shampoo
Price: 5.90

Physiological pH shampoo and body wash rich in natural ingredients to to enjoy the bath time as a pleasant experience of play and creativity. With organic aloe vera, sweet almond oil, organic honey and propolis, for a delicate and nourishing action.

Amused and clean, leaves hair velvety and luminous and skin soft.

How to use: Apply to hair and body and massage gently, then rinse.

Ingredients: Aqua, Magnesium lauryl sulfate, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Coco-glucoside, Glyceryl oleate, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Glycerin, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Parfum, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Sodium chloride, Benzyl alcohol, Myristyl lactate, Prunus amygdalus dulcis oil, Helianthus annuus seed oil, Citric acid, Calendula officinalis extract, Dehydroacetic acid, Mel*, Propolis, Tocopherol.

*Organic

Natural product with physiological pH 4.5-5.5

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

Vendor: BEE IT

Physiological pH shampoo & body wash rich in natural ingredients to enjoy the bath time as a pleasant experience of play and creativity. With organic aloe vera, sweet almond oil, organic honey and propolis, for a delicate and nourishing action.
Amused and clean, his hair will be velvety and luminous, and his skin will be even softer and more fragrant.

entry.title: NAIF Cooling Aftersun 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 13.90

Naïf Cooling After Sun Gel soothes, moisturizes and restores the skin after a sunny day. Aloe Vera provides cooling and regeneration, glycerine for hydration. This keeps even the most sensitive skin soft and supple. Just what the skin needs after exposure to UV rays. Also nice: absorbs quickly and doesn't leave a sticky layer.

How to use: Apply generously after exposure to the sun. Especially on the areas that have had a lot of sun. Repeat if skin still feels dry.

Tip: Keep the gel in the refrigerator, so it is extra cooling.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Parfum/Fragrance, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Allantoin, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Xanthan Gum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

All Naïf products are vegan, made with a mild fragrance and dermatologically tested, without the 26 most common allergens. They also do not contain SLES or microplastics. The tubes are made from sugar cane-based bioplastic.

entry.title: LUUV Natural Kids Shower Foam 150ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Body Wash
Price: 10.90

This is LUUV kids shower foam – the ultimate bath-time companion that brings joy, playfulness, and eco-consciousness to your little one’s daily routine! Certified with the leading ECOCERT / COSMOS eco-certificate, this delightful foam will make showering an adventure filled with laughter and fun.

We understand that your child’s delicate skin deserves only the best, which is why this shower foam is crafted from carefully selected detergents that are gentle and won’t irritate your child’s precious skin. The sweet and juicy pear aroma is completely derived from natural sources, ensuring a captivating scent without any allergens. As for the vibrant pinkish purple color, a surprising secret ingredient is used – potato extract! That’s right, this eco-certified formula uses this natural wonder to create a mesmerizing hue that will captivate your child’s imagination. It’s like a burst of colorful magic in every pump!

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Fresh pear scent
  • Does not irritate or dry skin

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the shower gel on damp skin with light circular movements, rinse and dry.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Coco-Glucoside, Ipomoea Batatas (Potato) Root Extract, Cetyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Aroma, Acacia Senegal Gum, Maltodextrin

entry.title: LUUV Natural Kids Shampoo 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Shampoo
Price: 11.50

LUUV natural kids shampoo  – where fun meets healthy hair! This shampoo takes your child’s hair care to new heights with its completely natural, tear-free formula. Designed for little adventurers, it leaves hair strong, shiny, and gently detangles even the most resistant knots. With ECOCERT/COSMOS eco-certificate, you can trust that LUUV kids shampoo is not only gentle on your little one’s hair but also on the environment.

Carefully selected herbal detergents are perfect for your child’s delicate scalp, ensuring a nurturing and soothing wash. Shampoo is also infused with the goodness of moisturizing aloe and plant betaine – not only does it make their hair easy to comb, but it also strengthens it from root to tip, leaving it looking healthy, vibrant, and ready for any adventure that comes their way. The sweet and juicy pear aroma is naturally derived and allergen-free. LUUV natural kids shampoo is not only natural but also vegan, making it a choice you can feel great about. Experience hair that’s as soft as a mother’s caress and join the fun today!

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Tear-free formula
  • Fresh pear scent
  • Does not irritate skin
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS certified
  • Natural origin 98,4%

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply the shampoo thoroughly on wet hair. Massage into a lather. Rinse. Repeat the procedure, if necessary.

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Lauryl Glucose Carboxylate, Lauryl Glucoside, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Betaine, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Citric Acid, Glyceryl Oleate, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Aroma

entry.title: LUUV Natural Kids Bubble Bath 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Bath Foam
Price: 11.00

Transform your child’s bath time into a delightful adventure with LUUV pear bath foam for kids! This incredible bath foam is not only certified with the prestigious ECOCERT / COSMOS eco-certificate, but it also adds a touch of magic and excitement to every bathing experience. The rich and velvety soft foam, derived from carefully selected herbal detergents, caresses your little one’s delicate skin without causing any irritation or dryness. And the delicious pear aroma? It’s all-natural, creating a truly mouth-watering bathing experience.

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Fresh pear scent
  • Does not irritate or dry skin
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS certified
  • Natural origin 98,72%

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Just add this magical foam to warm running water, and let the enchanting bath time adventure begin!

Ingredients: Aqua, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Aroma, Glyceryl Oleate, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid

entry.title: LUUV Natural Kids Detangling Spray 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.00

Certified with the globally recognized ECOCERT/COSMOS certification, this spray is a game-changer for your little one’s hair care routine. It’s time to say goodbye to stubborn tangles and hello to hassle-free styling!

LUUV Detangle spray is specially formulated to tame even the most stubborn knots, leaving your little one’s hair silky smooth, strong, and oh-so-shiny! And let’s not forget the delightful scent! Detangling spray comes with a mouthwatering juicy pear scent that kids absolutely adore. Plus, you can rest easy knowing that the scent is naturally derived and free from any allergens. Your little one’s hair is in good hands. And now that your little one’s hair is tangle-free, it’s time to explore a whole new world of hairstyles! From cute pigtails to stylish braids, this spray opens up endless possibilities for your child’s hair adventures.

  • Natural and allergen-free
  • Fresh pear scent
  • Does not irritate skin
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS certified
  • Natural origin 99,76%

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Shake the bottle before use. Spray the conditioner on the hair, let it work for a few moments and comb through the hair. Can be used both on wet hair after washing and on dry hair daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Lecithin, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Olus Oil, Propanediol, Betaine, Coconut Alkanes, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Aroma

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Mineral Sunscreen 30SPF 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Suncreen
Price: 19.90

Petit & Jolie sunscreen SPF 30 protects your skin from harmful UV rays. The cream applies easily and leaves no white cast. It contains non-nano zinc oxide as a natural sun filter.

The mineral sunscreen does not contain parfum.

IMPORTANT: The cream provides effective protection against UV rays, but cannot guarantee 100% protection. Keep babies and children out of direct sunlight.

How to use: Apply a generous amount of sunscreen to the skin. Reapply frequently for optimal protection.

Ingredients: Aqua (water), Zinc Oxide, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Pentylene Glycol, Calcium Sodium Borosilicate, Sucrose Palmitate, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Oryzanol, Sucrose Distearate, Pongamia Pinnata Seed Extract, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Calendula Balm 55ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 9.90

Petit & Jolie Calendula Balm has been specially developed for irritated or chapped skin, such as cracked nipples and diaper rash. The organically grown Calendula extract has a restorative and soothing effect.

The balm does not contain perfume and water.

The balm consists of ingredients of 100% natural origin. It does not contain parabens, paraffin and synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Warm the calendula balm with your fingers. And massage the balm softly on the skin. Repeat as long as needed. 

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Helianthus Annuus Hybrid Oil *, Cocoglycerides, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Decyl Oleate, Cera Alba, Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract *, Daucus Carota Sativa Root Extract *, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract *, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Capsicum Annuum Extract *, Lithospermum Erytrorhizom Root Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Tocopherol.

* from organic source

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Massage Oil 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 9.90

Petit&Jolie Massage Oil nourishes and protects the skin and is very suitable for a baby massage, a nice relaxing moment for both of you. The ultra-soft oil consists of a combination of organically grown sunflower, jojoba and almond oils.

The massage oil is 100% from natural ingredients and contains no paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes.

The massage oil is also suitable as a skin oil (for all ages)

How to use: Pour a few drops of oil onto the palms of your (warm) hands and then gentle massage onto the skin of your baby.

Ingredients: Helianthus Annuus Hybrid Oil* (sunflower), Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil* (jojoba), Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil* (almond), Schizandra Sphenanthera Fruit Extract, Tocopherol (vitamin E), Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil (sunflower), Vanilla Planifolia Fruit Extract (vanilla), Parfum*

* organic source  

** natural essential oils

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Body Lotion 150ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 10.50

Petit&Jolie Body Lotion is a nourishing and moisturizing lotion especially designed for the fragile and sensitive skin of your baby. The apricot oil provides extra elasticity and a long-lasting ultra-soft skin. The body lotion is easy to spread and is quickly absorbed.

The body lotion is 100% from natural ingredients, so it contains no parabens, paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Gently massage on baby's skin after washing

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Helianthus Annuus (sunflower) Hybrid Oil*, Decyl Oleate, Glycerin, Prunus Armeniaca (apricot) Kernel Oil, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Hippophae Rhamnoides (sea buckthorn) Fruit Extract*, Chamomilla Recutita (camomile) Flower  Extrakt*, Schizandra Sphenanthera (schisandra) Fruit Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (rosemary)  Leaf Extract, Salvia Officinalis (sage) Leaf Extract, Helianthus Annuus (sunflower) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Sodium Phytate, Oryzanol, Xanthan Gum, Parfum*

* organic source

**natural essential oils

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Diaper Cream 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 8.90

Petit&Jolie Diaper Cream protects, restores and nourishes the skin around the diaper area. It cares for and protects the sensitive baby skin. The buttocks cream with, among other things, beeswax provides an extra layer of protection against moisture on the buttocks. The zinc oxide present has a drying effect. The unique composition of natural ingredients soothes the skin and prevents diaper rash. It makes the skin silky soft again.

The diaper cream is perfume free and is made from 100% natural ingredients, so it contains no parabens, paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Apply after changing diapers

Ingredients: Aqua, Decyl Oleate, Helianthus Annuus Hybrid Oil*, Sesamum Indicum Seed Oil*, Zinc Oxide, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Cera Alba*, Cetyl Ricinoleate, Sorbitan Sesquioleate, Lanolin, Magnesiumsulfate, Zinc PCA, Glyceryl Caprate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Aluminium Tristearate, Magnesium Stearate, Oryzanol, Vanilla Planifolia Fruit Extract*                       

* from organic source

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Nourishing Cream 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Lotion
Price: 9.60

Petit&Jolie Oily Cream is a nourishing and moisturizing cream especially for the delicate (baby) skin. The cream offers extra care and protection due to the unique composition of, among other things, organically grown shea butter and almond oil. Oily Cream is very suitable for babies with dry or sensitive skin and can be used for both the face and the body.

All ingredients are of 100% natural origin. The cream therefore contains no parabens, paraffin, synthetic fragrances and dyes.

How to use: Apply to the baby’s skin or face daily. If the skin is getting better you can change to the bodylotion.

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Hybrid Oil*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Pentylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Almond) Oil*, Squalane, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter*, Cetyl Palmitate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Polyglyceryl-3 Stearate, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Limnanthes Alba (Meadowfoam) Seed Oil, Sodium Polyphosphat, Jojoba Esters, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Wax, Acacia Decurrens Flower Wax, Polyglycerin-3, Tocopherol Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Sodium Levulinate, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Anisate, Parfum (Fragrance)**, Oryzanol

*organic source
**from natrural essential oils

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Hair & Body Shampoo 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Shampoo
Price: 8.90

Petit&Jolie Hair&Body Shampoo cleanses and cares for the skin and hair in a mild way. The special composition ensures supple skin and prevents dehydration. The shampoo is suitable for children with dry and sensitive skin. It doesn't sting the eyes.

Like all our products, the baby hair & body shampoo does not contain parabens, SLS, paraffin or synthetic fragrances and dyes. The baby shampoo is made from 100% natural ingredients.

The bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic.

How to use: While taking a shower or bath, add a small amount of shampoo to your hand or washcloth and lightly massage the skin and hair of your baby. Rinse well with water afterwards.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Coco-Glucoside, Decyl Glucoside, Xanthan Gum, Glyceryl Oleate, Parfum*, Dicaprylyl Ether, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Levulinate

* natural essential oils

entry.title: Petit&Jolie Bath Oil 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Petit & Jolie
Type: Bath Oil
Price: 10.50

Petit&Jolie Bath Oil gently cleanses the skin during the bath. The rich emulsion has a very caring effect, so that baby's skin feels soft and supple after the bath. This makes the bath oil suitable for babies with (very) dry skin.

The Bath Oil is made from 100% natural ingredients. So the oil does not contain parabens, paraffin, SLS or synthetic fragrances or dyes.

The Bath Oil can be used directly from birth. But older children and adults can of course also use the bath oil very well.

The packaging is made from 100% recycled plastic.

How to use: While filling the baby bath tub, add a little bath oil and stir with your hand.

Ingredients: Glycerin, Helianthus Annuus Hybrid Oil*, Polyglyceryl-5 Oleate, Parfum**, Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract*, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil

* from organic source 

**natural essential oils

entry.title: LUUV Magnesium Cream 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Lotion
Price: 17.00

Introducing uplifting and rejuvenating LUUV Magnesium Cream – your gateway to a world of wellness and relaxation.  Certified with the prestigious ECOCERT/COSMOS eco-certificate, this Magnesium Cream is a trusted and sustainable choice for your well-being. With daily use, it becomes your partner in preventing and reducing magnesium deficiency, while providing relief from muscle aches and tensions. Harnessing the power of magnesium chloride, it offers a transdermal method of absorption, allowing your body to benefit from this vital mineral in the fastest and most efficient way. 

This cream is infused with the goodness of coconut oil, a natural emollient that closely resembles your skin’s own lipids. This dynamic duo ensures that even those with dry skin can absorb magnesium effectively, while providing deep hydration and nourishment. Plus, it’s suitable for even the most sensitive skin, ensuring a gentle and soothing experience for all. 

  • For everyday use
  • Prevents/reduces magnesium deficiency
  • Relieves muscle pain and tension
  • Moisturizing and nourishing
  • For the whole family
  • Suitable during pregnancy
  • ECOCERT/COSMOS
  • Beauty Shortlist Awards 2024- Wellbeing Category Gold medal

Key ingredients: 

  • Magnesium helps muscles to relax, muscle spasms are caused by lack of magnesium. Post-workout, transdermal magnesium is best because it’s topical (you apply it to the area that strained the muscles). There are no side effects when taking topical magnesium and the effect is immediate.
  • Coconut oil/coconut fat is the lightest of solid fats. With good absorption and blends well into the skin, nourishing but not heavy. Is very similar to the lipids in our own skin, so human skin absorbs it well.
  • Lemon essential oil is used to perfume the product, but it also has strong detox properties. Mild enough with a pleasant citrus scent. It is well suited for anti-cellulite products and for boosting the skin. Strengthens the immune system.

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | vegan | certified | paraben free

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Magnesium cream is suitable for use by the whole family and is also safe for pregnant women to use. It wonderfully helps relieve muscle tension after exercise and prevents and reduces magnesium deficiency in the body. In children, it helps relieve discomfort caused by growing pains. The cream contains magnesium chloride, which is best absorbed through the skin and also the fastest way to reduce magnesium deficiency.

Ingredients: Aqua, Magnesium Chloride , Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyglyceryl-3 Distearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate , Glyceryl stearate SE, Citrus Limon Peel (Lemon) Oil, Cymbopogon Flexuosus (Lemongrass) Oil, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Triethyl Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Xanthan gum, Benzoic Acid, Citral, Limonene

entry.title: NAIF Lotion Baby Wipes 54pcs
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Baby Wipes
Price: 3.95

Naïf plastic-free lotion wipes are everything you would expect from a baby wipe: strong, well moisturized, with ingredients that take good care of the sensitive baby skin. Does not include polyester fibers and microplastics. Also suitable as a nose cleaner.

By using extra (vegetable) glycerin, aloe vera and bamboo for extra hydration and prematurely soothing red baby bottoms. The lotion has been dermatologically tested and does not contain alcohol, perfume or other ingredients that can cause red baby's buttocks.

How to use: While changing, open the package with one hand, holding your baby with the other. Wipe the area well and don't forget the folds. When finished, close the package tightly to prevent dehydration.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Bambusa Arundinacea Stem (Bamboo) Extract, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Levulinic Acid, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice Powder, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen Stick 0% Perfume for Baby & Kids SPF50 36g
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 14.90

Mineral Sunscreen Stick SPF50 is a sunscreen for Baby & Kids. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation. Easy to take and to apply, even by kids who want to do everything themselves. Without added perfume and suitable for sensitive skin.

The sunscreen contains zinc-oxide: a natural ingredient that adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects sunbeams. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for baby- and kids skin
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested, 0% perfume for extra sensitive skin

How to use: Apply a generous amount to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Make sure to spread it well. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for maximum protection

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Zinc Oxide, Helianthus Annuus Seed Cera, Hydrogenated Rapeseed Oil, Tocopherol, Pongamol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Ascorbyl Palmitate

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen 0% Perfume for Baby & Kids SPF50 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 22.90

Mineral Sunscreen SPF50 is sunscreen for Baby & Kids. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation. 

The sunscreen contains zinc-oxide: a natural ingredient that adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects sunbeams. The sunscreen also does not contain added perfume, which makes it suitable for even the most sensitive skin. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation. The added natural oils make application easy and hydrates the skin.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for baby- and kids skin
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested, 0% perfume for extra sensitive skin

How to use: Shake the sunscreen before use. Apply a generous amount evenly to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Dextrin Palmitate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Triheptanoin, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Palmitic Acid, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Oryzanol, Bisabolol, Pongamol

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: SoKind Love Lines Emollient Stretch Mark Balm 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: SoKind
Type: Lotion
Price: 64.00

The consistency of Love Lines is loved by our customers and can best be described as an airy souffle. The clear effect on stretch marks, combined with the ability to ensure moisture and elasticity, makes Love Lines a product many customers return to again and again.

Naturally formulated Stretch Mark Balm with the effective, active ingredient Regestril™, which prevents and visibly repairs stretch marks.

Registril™, consisting of lima bean extracts and peptides, works by lightening pigmentation and repairing the skin in and around stretch marks, making them far less visible. At the same time, the peptides stimulate collagen production so that the firmness of the skin improves and repairs and smoothes the damaged tissue, which also makes the product perfect for cesarean sections.

Aloe vera, shea butter, and shorea butter ensure soft and well-moisturized skin and improve elasticity. SoKind has selected antioxidants from vitamin E and sea buckthorn, which have a healing effect and an anti-inflammatory effect on the stretch marks and the surrounding skin.

How to use: Apply generously to strech mark prone skin, morning and evening.

Ingredients: Aqua, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice*, Pentylene Glycol, Cetyl Palmitate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Shorea Stenoptera (Sal) Seed Butter, Glycerin*, Cetyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter*, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil*, Butylene Glycol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7, Phaseolus Lunatus Seed Extract, Rutin, Caprylyl Glycol, Tocopherol, Hippophae Rhamnoides (Sea Buckthorn) Fruit Juice, Cetearyl Olivate, Xanthan Gum, Cetyl Hydroxyethylcellulose, Dipotassium Phosphate, Sorbitan Olivate, Sodium Gluconate, Citric Acid, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate.

*organic ingredient

entry.title: SoKind Pure Kindness Repairing Multi-product 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: SoKind
Type: Lotion
Price: 42.00

A natural, preventive, and moisturizing multi-product that protects, heals, soothes, and rebuilds chapped, cracked, and dry skin anywhere on your own or your baby's skin.

It has been specially developed to be used in connection with breastfeeding as both a preventive and repairing nipple balm that does not need to be washed off before the baby is breastfed.

Pure Kindness is formulated with Nordic Saltwort, which is particularly known for its moisture-binding properties and ability to create a protective barrier. Saltwort helps to reduce redness and irritation and balances the skin's natural pH value while also having anti-inflammatory properties.

The Nordic Saltwort is combined with fatty acid-containing oils from Almonds and Avocado, which promote the skin's natural collagen production and protect and repair the skin.

How to use: Apply a small amount to the desired area and pat on gently. The balm can be reapplied as many times as needed. It is a leave-on balm and does not need to be washed off before nursing.

Ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Olus Oil, Oleic/Linoleic/Linolenic Polyglycerides, Persea Gratissima Oil, Cetyl Palmitate, Tribehenin, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil*, Salicornia Herbacea Extract, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Tocopheryl Acetate, Tocopherol

*organic ingredient
